message: Hello, I recently developed a very itchy penis which when I itch, leads to red patchs which sometimes become red and glossy. It is very irritable and causes pain when i have intercourse. I also have developed itchy thighs.. It started just at the top and has now developed over most of my thighs. The itching comes and goes and shows in small patches , not lumps but itchy red spots. i am worried that it is an std as i have had a lot of unprotected sex recently (lesson learnt) but the symptoms don t relate to any std so i m puzzled!? i also have what i thought was joggers nipple? very itchy nipple and also my face sometimes has dry patches on the eyelids and near the hair receding line? It has been going on for the last 3 months and as i m still in China and not a native speaker, i can t really find any treatment or diagnosis. please help?
label: urgent
label_rationale: Genital and spreading thigh dermatitis with pain on intercourse warrants prompt derm evaluation for infection or inflammatory cause; chronic course does not lower priority below urgent.

message: I have been on the birth control Kelnor 1/35 for a few years now and it has work great. Just this past month, my doctor without telling me put me on Zovia 1/35. I read that these two are similar but I am now noticing my thoughts upsetting me, over thinking, and thinking my feelings have changed for someone or something when just a week ago when I first took this new pill, I was fine. This does not feel like myself and I am becoming very overwhelmed and upset. Do you think it is because of the switch?
label: routine
label_rationale: Medication mood side-effect question without acute safety red flags; non-dermatology issue appropriate for routine routing/referral.

message: I have a smallish red spot on the right top edge of my penis head, as well as a blotchy red area on the dorsal side of the shaft, in the top area where I was circumcised. The spots/blotches are painless, do not itchy, and might be very slightly raised, but not very noticeably so. I currently am in a committed relationship and we do not use condoms, but neither of us have ever experienced any problems or concerns regarding STDs. I assume it is some kind of friction irritation, but am concerned it is something more serious.
label: urgent
label_rationale: New painless genital lesions still need prompt clinician assessment to exclude infection or other pathology.

message: My 8 month old has HFM, and is in a lot of pain. Blisters everywhere, barely able to sleep and is inconsolable when awake. Other than giving him Tylenol and offering cold things to chew on I m not sure what to do to keep him comfortable enough to sleep?
label: urgent
label_rationale: Infant with widespread HFM blisters, severe pain, and poor sleep needs prompt pediatric guidance for pain control and dehydration risk.

message: My butt is really sore bumpy and itchy around anus and cheeks even surrounding vagina, is it bcoz I shaved it when I felt it was itchy??? I m scared! I just suffered from hair dye allergy and my armpits are sore and red too! Also couple times my bowel movement had fresh blood in it!!!!! Help!!!!!!
label: urgent
label_rationale: Perianal/vulvar rash plus rectal bleeding and recent allergic dermatitis needs prompt evaluation; no clear same-day systemic emergency described.

message: Hi I had an ubaliacil hernia operated on, on the 15th September. It started oozing puss a week later through the wound. The wound stopped oozing out of my wound and then the same day it started coming out of my bellybutton. I put up with it for 7 weeks then my specialist did an exploration and left a 2cm cut just inside my bellybutton and said that there was just a pocket of the puss and that it would dry up it s been over a week now and it hasn t stopped and is getting more green every day what should I do ?
label: urgent
label_rationale: Worsening purulent post-operative wound drainage requires prompt surgical/wound review; no reported fever or sepsis signs to classify as emergent.

message: I have been told that I have a chest full of lympnoids some people say you dont get lympnoids in your lungs but my c- scan says otherwise i am scheduled for a biopsy sometime in the next couple weeks and I am very nervous and scared of what is happening..
label: routine
label_rationale: Anxiety about scheduled pulmonary workup without acute symptoms; informational support and routine follow-up.

message: Hi Doctor I have been sufferring from Psoriasis on my palm, fingers and feet from last 10 yrs. I have tried several medicines but nothing helps me other than Topisal 6%. I have recently had a flare up which is bad. My figers are all scaly and itchy. I have been applying topisal 3% but its not working. Could you pls suggest what can do to get relief from the scales and itch. Thanks
label: urgent
label_rationale: Severe palmoplantar psoriasis flare failing current therapy needs timely treatment adjustment.

message: I have a small area of sore gums inside my mouth . It s on the bottom left side, on the inside side of the jawbone where my wisdom tooth would be if I had not had it removed years ago. It hurts to push on it, feels slightly bumpy underneath the skin, and may be slightly swollen. I haven t had any injuries or anything. What could it be?
label: routine
label_rationale: Localized oral gum soreness without systemic signs; dental/oral routine concern for non-derm routing.

message: hi, im 22 female my weight is 45, height 54 my kidney is enlarge(big) on two side of the kidney the symptoms i have is feeling likevomitting, breast pain, itching in kidney and have some disturbance in urinating and my body is restless i did not met any doctor this problem was happen last week and i dont know how it happens i was feared and tensed of this problem im very scared to see the doctor please help me doctorsuggest me the solution
label: emergent
label_rationale: Acute bilateral renal symptoms with nausea and urinary disturbance may indicate serious renal/obstructive disease requiring same-day emergency evaluation.

message: Hi. Ive been on a low dose bc pill for a few months now after switching from the IUD. All periods have been normal until this month. No period. Its several days late now, I start my active pills again today. Ive had lots of cramping for the last two weeks and nausea off and on for the last 2-3 days. Home pregnancy test was negative...? I know there were a few days I took my pill later than usual by a few hours. Not sure what to think.
label: routine
label_rationale: Late period and mild symptoms with negative home test; routine gynecologic follow-up unless worsening.

message: When I lay down at night my feet twitch. Just one twitch about every 30 seconds or so. Both feet. I can feel something originating in my groin area then sorta shooting down to my foot and causing a twitch. It keeps me from falling asleep quickly and is not painful, just sooo annoying. It is starting to happen during the day now.
label: routine
label_rationale: Non-painful intermittent twitching without weakness or other red flags; routine neurologic evaluation.

message: hi doc! good day! i have a little problem but iam shy to go to doctor. i have a warts , a big one in my butt. color red. i notice i just had this when i gave birth. i dont know what causes it but im wondering if theres any home remedy that i can do to remove this/ i want to cut it but im scared cause it might worsen it. what can i do? thank you.
label: urgent
label_rationale: Large new anogenital lesion needs prompt in-person diagnosis; discourage unsafe self-removal.

message: HI I have a small, hard lump slightly of centre at the end of my sterum, If i look down while breathing out and pulling my tummy in its quite obvious, its noticeable. Its not attached to skin by seems to be on the process thing where last ribs meet.
label: routine
label_rationale: Stable small xiphoid-area prominence without acute symptoms; both labelers agreed routine.

message: A few days ago, I noticed my ears became incredibly itchy, red and with small bumps. The skin behind the ears was also itchy and little red bumps developed. My arms and legs have also developed little bumps, either red or skin colored. They are itchy but only on my ears, arms and legs.

label_rationale: Acute widespread pruritic eruption on multiple body sites warrants prompt dermatology review.
